tyrsfluidvoidstuff.configuration.title: Tyr's Fluid Void Stuff
tyrsfluidvoidstuff.configuration.maxFlui: Maximum vertical drop (in blocks) that a fluid column may span below its source. 0 = vanilla (unlimited). N > 0 means a fluid can drop at most N blocks below its source Y; the column then ends with air underneath, and the renderer draws the fade-into-void gradient at the bottom.
tyrsfluidvoidstuff.configuration.fluidCo: Fluids in this list are NOT affected by the custom column-length / orphaned-fall logic and behave 100% vanilla. List both source and flowing forms (e.g. "minecraft:lava", "minecraft:flowing_lava") for full opt-out.
